questions.question: Who are you?
questions.subtext: This shapes which resources and language we use throughout your guide.

options.label: I'm an athlete
options.description: I compete in sport and want to sharpen my mental game.

options.label: I'm a sports parent
options.description: I support a young athlete and want to be a better resource for them.

questions.question: Where are you right now?
questions.subtext: Pick the description that feels most like your current situation.

options.label: Foundation
options.description: Fun is fading, pressure is rising, or confidence is shaky.

options.label: Self-Awareness
options.description: Emotions, self-talk, anxiety, or comparison are showing up.

options.label: Skill Acquisition
options.theme: Training the Mind Like the Body
options.description: Inconsistency, perfectionism, burnout risk, or training feels scattered.

options.label: Competition
options.description: Nerves, choking, spiraling after mistakes, or fear of failure.

options.label: Peak Performance
options.description: Spotlight, expectations, plateaus, or balancing sport and life.

options.label: Adversity & Resilience
options.description: Injury, being cut, disappointment, or fear of re-injury.

options.label: Leadership & Legacy
options.description: Mentoring teammates, senior-year pressure, or navigating conflict as a leader.

options.label: Life After Sport
options.description: Loss of structure, identity shift, or figuring out what comes next.

questions.question: What's your biggest challenge right now?
questions.subtext: Pick the one that resonates most. This is the core of your personalized guide.

options.label: Confidence
options.descriptionAthlete: I doubt myself, struggle to trust my training, or shrink under pressure.
options.descriptionParent: My athlete doubts themselves or loses confidence after setbacks.

options.label: Pressure & Nerves
options.descriptionAthlete: I get anxious before competition or tighten up in big moments.
options.descriptionParent: My athlete gets overwhelmed by nerves or freezes in high-stakes moments.

options.label: Motivation
options.descriptionAthlete: I struggle to stay driven, especially when results aren't coming.
options.descriptionParent: My athlete is losing interest or seems burned out.

options.label: Mistakes & Failure
options.descriptionAthlete: I dwell on errors, spiral after bad games, or can't move on.
options.descriptionParent: My athlete can't shake mistakes and takes losses too hard.

options.label: Identity & Self-Worth
options.descriptionAthlete: My value feels tied entirely to my performance or others' opinions.
options.descriptionParent: My athlete's self-worth is wrapped up in sport results.

options.label: Overthinking
options.descriptionAthlete: I get stuck in my head during competition and can't just play.
options.descriptionParent: My athlete overanalyzes and second-guesses themselves mid-game.

options.label: Injury or Setback
options.descriptionAthlete: I'm recovering from injury, being cut, or a major disappointment.
options.descriptionParent: My athlete is navigating injury, deselection, or a tough setback.

options.label: Transition
options.descriptionAthlete: I'm moving to a new level, role, or facing the end of my career.
options.descriptionParent: My athlete is transitioning between levels or preparing for life after sport.

options.label: Parent–Athlete Communication
options.descriptionAthlete: The dynamic with my parents around sport feels stressful or unsupportive.
options.descriptionParent: I want to improve how I support and communicate with my athlete.

questions.question: How soon do you need this?
questions.subtext: Helps us prioritize which resources to surface first.

options.label: Right Now
options.description: I have a competition, season opener, or critical moment coming up very soon.

options.label: This Season
options.description: I'm working on this consistently and want to build over the coming weeks.

options.label: Long Game
options.description: I'm building habits for the long term — no immediate deadline.
